things.name: Doi Inthanon National Park
things.description: Thailand's highest peak at 2,565 m — misty twin Royal chedis, hill-tribe villages and stunning waterfalls

things.name: Elephant Nature Park
things.description: Ethical elephant sanctuary — bathe, feed and walk alongside rescued elephants without riding

things.name: Old City Temples Walk
things.description: Explore the moat-ringed ancient quarter with Wat Chedi Luang, Wat Phra Singh and 30 other temples

things.name: Sunday Night Walking Street
things.description: Wualai Road street market every Sunday — handmade crafts, silk, silver jewellery and northern Thai food

things.name: Doi Suthep Temple
things.description: Golden chedi temple perched at 1,676 m — 300 steps or cable car and panoramic views over Chiang Mai

things.name: Thai Cooking Class
things.description: Half-day market tour then cook pad thai, massaman curry and mango sticky rice — dozens of schools to choose from

things.name: Night Bazaar
things.description: Nightly market on Chang Khlan Road — handicrafts, clothing, hill-tribe textiles and live music

things.name: Chiang Rai Day Trip
things.description: Visit the surreal White Temple (Wat Rong Khun), Blue Temple and the Black House — 3 hours north

things.name: Mae Sa Valley
things.description: 30 km of river valley with orchid farms, butterfly parks, elephant camps and the Sticky Waterfall

things.name: Thai Massage at Wat Pho
things.description: Study or receive authentic Northern-style Thai massage — Chiang Mai is the heartland of traditional massage
